elements.description: ถังบำบัดน้ำเสียสำเร็จรูป (hatched circle symbol)

elements.description: ถังดักไขมันสำเร็จรูป (hatched square symbol)

elements.description: ชุดมาตรวัดน้ำ Ø1/2" (ค่าใช้จ่ายในการติดตั้งเป็นของผู้รับจ้างทั้งสิ้น), fed by CW main, connects onward to a storm-drain catch point

elements.description: บ่อพักท่อระบายน้ำสำเร็จรูป ขนาด 0.40x0.40 ม. พร้อมฝา ค.ส.ล.

elements.description: X-in-square symbols marking access points along the dashed perimeter storm-drain run -- counted 8 around the building envelope (2 along the top/D edge, 1 on the left/west edge near row C, 1 lower on the west edge, 2 at the bottom-left area near row A/A', 1 at bottom-right, 1 near the water-meter connection at bottom-left corner)
elements.grid_ref: perimeter, following the dashed line around the building footprint (rows D through A/A'/A'', grid 1 through 3)

elements.description: ท่อคอนกรีตท้องตลาด Ø0.20ม. ลาด 1:200, จุดต้นท่อลึก 0.60ม. -- runs along the top/north perimeter (near row D, grid 3 corner) and continues around the building connecting the catch points
elements.grid_ref: perimeter, dashed line around the building footprint

elements.description: ท่อประปา Ø3/4"CW เดินใต้พื้น จากมาตรวัดน้ำ ผ่านแนวผนังด้านตะวันตกขึ้นไปยังห้องน้ำ, นอน 1, นอน 2 (label 'Ø3/4"CW' printed twice: once along the top wall of นอน 1, once near the bottom-left entry point)
elements.grid_ref: runs along interior/west wall from bottom-left entry up through ห้องน้ำ and the bedrooms

warnings: GRID CONFIRMATION (independent re-read, t4): the printed dimension chain on this page (horizontal 1.30+4.00+3.00+1.30 under circled grid labels 1/2/3; vertical 1.50+4.00+bracket(2.00+3.50)+then a further unlabeled 1.50+1.50=3.00 extension below circled letter A) exactly matches the building grid master (หน้า00_gridline.json): grid1(0.0)-grid2(4.0)-grid3(7.0), and D(0.0)-C(4.0)-B(6.0)-A(9.5)-A'(11.0)-A''(12.5). This confirms t3's conclusion that this is a real structural-grid-linked plan, not free text. Note: this specific page does NOT print circled 'A'' / 'A''' labels itself -- those dummy-grid names only appear in the master file (sourced from page 06); here I only observe the raw unlabeled dimension segments, consistent with the master's own sourcing note.
This page also contains a smaller inset detail 'แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลห้องน้ำ' (1:50), captured in the sibling file, plus the septic tank / grease trap spec notes reproduced above in equipment_specs.

Exact routing of individual small-diameter branch CW pipes into each room and the precise identity/count of every perimeter X-in-square symbol is difficult to trace precisely at this resolution; positions and the count of 8 are best-effort/approximate, not measured coordinates -- flagged for zoom-review.
No content change from t3; only wrapper-level addition is source_image. Pattern 'plan' unaffected by 2026-07-08 taxonomy update.
